title: Australian bank forced to rehire staff after misleading claims about chatbot productivity
description: Commonwealth Bank of Australia is rehiring 45 workers it previously replaced with an AI-powered voice bot, after a union challenge revealed the bank had made misleading claims that chatbots were handling higher call volumes than humans. The Finance Sector Union says call volumes were actually rising, forcing managers to help answer phones, and argues the case shows how rushed AI rollouts and overstated productivity gains can harm long‑serving staff and create significant stress before companies are forced to reverse course.
